health_conditions: pre-existing neurological symptoms in left arm/hand

side_effects.description: Numbness, warm tingling, weakness, fingers twitching in both hands but mostly in left hand; also occurring to a lesser degree in left foot; comes in waves and sometimes completely gone

protocol_notes: Taking BPC-157 for gut issues (gas, bloating, heartburn, reflux, anxiety). Had pre-existing neurological symptoms in left arm/hand of unknown origin. Also taking magnesium glycinate at night but stopped it to rule it out. Stopped BPC-157 to see if symptoms subside. Suspects possible histamine reaction.
